meta.description: 前列腺癌疾病层知识（流行病学、后ARPI治疗格局、PSMA靶点与影像评估）；不含具体产品名，可用于跨药物复用

epidemiology_and_burden.description: 前列腺癌在中国的疾病负担、分期特征与生存结局

entries.title: China prostate cancer burden continues to rise
entries.title_zh: 中国前列腺癌疾病负担持续上升
entries.content: China reports approximately 134,200 new prostate cancer cases and 47,500 deaths, indicating a sustained increase in burden and high health-system pressure.
entries.content_zh: 中国前列腺癌新发约13.42万例、死亡约4.75万例，整体疾病负担仍在上升，晚期管理压力持续增加。

entries.title: High de novo metastatic proportion at diagnosis
entries.content: The proportion of patients presenting with metastatic disease at initial diagnosis in China is reported around 54%, higher than several developed countries.
entries.content_zh: 中国患者初诊即远处转移比例约54%，明显高于部分发达国家，提示早筛与早诊仍是关键短板。

entries.title: Advanced-stage survival remains poor
entries.title_zh: 晚期患者长期生存仍差
entries.content: Five-year survival is around 27% in metastatic prostate cancer and around 15% in metastatic castration-resistant disease, reflecting substantial unmet need after progression.
entries.content_zh: 转移性前列腺癌5年生存率约27%，进入去势抵抗并伴转移后约15%，提示后线阶段仍存在显著未满足需求。

entries.title: Overall survival has improved, but stage gap persists
entries.title_zh: 总体生存率改善但分期差距仍显著
entries.content: China's age-standardized 5-year net survival increased from 57.7% to 71.1% over time, yet outcomes remain highly stage-dependent.
entries.content_zh: 中国前列腺癌5年年龄标化净生存率由57.7%提升至71.1%，但晚期与早期之间的预后鸿沟依旧明显。

treatment_landscape_post_arpi.description: 后ARPI时代的治疗路径、耐药挑战与序贯决策要点

entries.title: Frontline ARPI use has become dominant
entries.content: Frontline ARPI-based combinations have increased rapidly, with real-world usage reported above 80%, shifting resistance patterns and downstream treatment choices.
entries.content_zh: ARPI联合方案一线使用率已快速提升并超过80%，推动了后续耐药谱变化，也重塑了二线决策逻辑。

entries.title: Cross-resistance limits ARPI switch benefit
entries.content: After progression on one ARPI, switching to another ARPI typically yields short PSA-PFS and low objective response rates, supporting mechanism-switch strategies.
entries.content_zh: 首个ARPI进展后再换同机制ARPI，常见PSA-PFS较短、客观缓解率偏低，提示应优先考虑机制转换而非惯性互换。

entries.title: Treatment transition rates decline with later lines
entries.title_zh: 后线治疗承接率逐级下降
entries.content: In real-world cohorts, rates of receiving second- and third-line treatment are low, indicating a narrow therapeutic window and the need to optimize earlier effective therapy.
entries.content_zh: 真实世界中，进入二线和三线治疗的患者比例明显下降，提示治疗窗口较窄，应尽量在更早阶段完成高价值干预。

entries.title: Post-ARPI sequencing should be biomarker-driven
entries.title_zh: 后ARPI序贯应采用生物标志物驱动
entries.content: Decision-making after ARPI progression should combine disease burden, symptoms, organ function, and biomarkers (such as DNA repair status and PSMA imaging) to guide mechanism-based sequencing.
entries.content_zh: ARPI进展后应综合疾病负荷、症状、器官功能及分子分层（如DNA修复状态、PSMA影像）进行机制化序贯，而非仅按既往用药惯性推进。

entries.title: Single-metric progression assessment is insufficient
entries.title_zh: 单一指标评估进展不足以支持转线决策
entries.content: PSA dynamics and structural imaging can be asynchronous; integrated assessment using symptoms, PSA kinetics, and imaging is required to reduce delayed or inappropriate line switching.
entries.content_zh: PSA变化与结构影像进展可出现不同步，仅依赖单一指标易造成延迟或误判；应采用症状、PSA动力学与影像联合评估。

psma_target_and_imaging.description: PSMA靶点生物学、筛选逻辑与影像评估方法学

entries.title: PSMA is a core actionable target in advanced disease
entries.title_zh: PSMA是晚期前列腺癌的核心可行动靶点
entries.content: PSMA is a transmembrane target broadly expressed in advanced prostate cancer and supports both disease characterization and target-directed radioligand strategies.
entries.content_zh: PSMA为前列腺癌相关跨膜靶点，在晚期阶段表达广泛，可同时支撑分子影像评估与靶向放射配体治疗策略。

entries.title: PSMA PET positivity requires both inclusion and exclusion criteria
entries.title_zh: PSMA PET筛选需同时满足阳性纳入与阴性排除
entries.content: Typical screening requires at least one lesion with uptake above liver background and excludes patients with large PSMA-negative lesions, reducing mismatched biology.
entries.content_zh: PSMA筛选通常要求至少存在一个摄取高于肝背景的病灶，同时排除较大PSMA阴性病灶，以降低生物学不匹配导致的疗效不确定性。

entries.title: Most post-ARPI mCRPC patients are PSMA-positive but still heterogeneous
entries.title_zh: 后ARPI mCRPC总体PSMA阳性比例高但仍存在异质性
entries.content: PSMA-positive prevalence can exceed 90% under trial criteria, yet intrapatient heterogeneity remains clinically relevant for response prediction and sequencing.
entries.content_zh: 在研究筛选标准下，PSMA阳性比例可超过90%，但个体内病灶异质性仍会影响疗效与序贯策略，需要持续分层管理。

entries.title: PSMA PET response frameworks improve prognostic discrimination
entries.title_zh: PSMA PET评估框架可提升预后区分能力
entries.content: Compared with conventional structural criteria, PSMA PET-based progression frameworks (for example PPP and RECIP) show stronger association with overall survival and can detect progression earlier in selected settings.
entries.content_zh: 相较传统结构影像标准，基于PSMA PET的进展判定框架（如PPP、RECIP）与总生存相关性更强，并可在部分场景更早识别进展。

entries.title: Endocrine therapy can transiently modulate PSMA imaging signals
entries.title_zh: 内分泌治疗可短期影响PSMA信号解读
entries.content: Androgen-pathway interventions may upregulate PSMA signal and induce early imaging flare; when clinically feasible, timing PSMA PET at or beyond 3 months after endocrine initiation helps reduce misclassification.
entries.content_zh: 雄激素通路干预可上调PSMA表达并引发早期影像“闪烁”现象；在临床允许的前提下，内分泌治疗启动后至少约3个月再行PSMA PET有助于降低误判。
